config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the majority or the state. In my view, a just society protects basic individual rights first, then balances them with the common good only when there is a clear and necessary reason. From my perspective, the best societies are not those that sacrifice people for the collective, but those that protect people while still encouraging responsibility to others.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, pengalaman sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” hak-hak dasar mudah sekali dikorbankan, terutama bagi kelompok yang tidak populer atau minoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi menurut saya prioritasnya harus membatasi bahaya dan melindungi hak dasar, bukan membenarkan pengabaian terhadap individu. Masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak pribadi dihormati terlebih dahulu, lalu kepentingan bersama diatur secara sempit dan hati-hati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still disagree with the statement: in Indonesia, I have seen how easily “public interest” can be used to pressure individuals, silence criticism, or excuse unfair treatment. Society is important, but it is not automatically morally superior to the person, especially when the person is a minority or has no power. Public safety and shared obligations can justify limits in some cases, but only narrowly and with real accountability, not as a blanket excuse. For me, the right balance is protecting individual dignity first, because once that is ignored, “society’s interests” often end up meaning the interests of the strongest group.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika kita berkali-kali melihat bagaimana bahasa “demi kebaikan bersama” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Poin tentang keamanan publik memang valid, tetapi pembatasan hak harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan alasan umum untuk menekan orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menuntut individu mengalah dulu, melainkan yang melindungi hak dasar terlebih dahulu lalu menyeimbangkan kepentingan bersama secara terbatas. Kalau hak individu tidak dijadikan batas utama, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi kepentingan pihak yang paling kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The statement overreaches, and I reject it because in Indonesia “the common good” is too often used to pressure people who are already weak or unpopular. Society does matter, but it should not sit above basic individual rights by default, because once that happens, the strongest group can define its own interest as everyone’s interest. Public safety and social order can justify limited restrictions, but those limits must be narrow, transparent, and accountable, not a blank check for authority. To me, a fair society protects individual dignity first and then asks people to contribute to the collective in ways that do not erase their rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika, itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk penyalahgunaan kuasa. Pengalaman kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan utama, kelompok minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer sering kali yang paling dulu dikorbankan. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi menurut saya ia harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang jelas, bukan mengalahkannya secara default. Masyarakat yang sehat justru menjaga hak individu sebagai garis batas, lalu baru menyeimbangkan kebutuhan bersama secara sempit, transparan, dan akuntabel.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
